text.title: user-story-mapping Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for user-story-mapping as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Walking skeleton silently dropped because "nothing felt minimal" for one activity.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every activity exists because the user must complete it. If no task is minimal there, the activity itself is wrong.

failure-mode.description: Backbone drifts toward implementation steps: "Authenticate user", "Query database".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Backbone activities must be user-observable life events, not system operations.
